structural.data_entity_notes: Single QuestionRecord per question (146 records), no relational tables. All data in Zustand store persisted to localStorage.

functional.must_have_notes: FR-001 through FR-027 from requirements.json. All are in scope for this build.
user_workflow_list: Study session: answer questions, see explanations, advance through mastery states
Skills review: browse 12 practical skills with step-by-step guides
Progress check: view estimated score, topic grid, weak areas
Manual save: trigger Redis backup from Settings
Data restore: recover from Redis backup after localStorage loss
functional.permission_notes: No authentication, no authorization. Single user tool.
data_pipeline_list: localStorage Zustand store → Vercel /api/sync → Upstash Redis (polling, 60s dirty-flag gate)
functional.real_time_notes: No WebSockets. Auto-sync is periodic polling with dirty flag, not real-time.

integration.auth_notes: API key auth only (UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN). No OAuth, no user sessions.
integration.sync_notes: 60s polling with dirty flag. Data loss window: up to 60s of un-synced answers.

tier_rationale: 34 components sits at the boundary of Medium/Large by structural count, but functional complexity is low (1 user, 0 auth, 1 API, 2 endpoints). The algorithm (5-state machine with reversal detection) is the only area of genuine complexity. Classifying as Medium-high with 35 total steps is appropriate — sufficient granularity for a less-capable executor model, without excessive overhead.

recommendations.content_gate_notes: CON-005 requires user to verify clinical accuracy of questions.ts and skills.ts before any UI is built that displays content. This gate is Sprint 2 Step 3 — execution PAUSES and resumes only after user confirms.

sprint_structure.name: Foundation
sprint_structure.focus: Project scaffolding, type system, design system, PWA configuration
steps: S01: Vite + React + TypeScript project scaffolding (tsconfig strict:true, package.json, npm install)
S02: TypeScript type definitions — all 4 type files (algorithm.ts, session.ts, store.ts, content.ts)
S03: Design system CSS — globals.css with all design tokens from style-template.md. Run frontend-design skill first.
S04: PWA assets + vite.config.ts + index.html iOS meta tags
sprint_structure.validation_checkpoint: Project builds with zero TypeScript errors. vite build produces a valid dist/. Design tokens are visible in browser.
sprint_structure.sprint_blocker: S01 must complete before S02; S02 must complete before S03 and S04

sprint_structure.name: Infrastructure & Data
sprint_structure.focus: Upstash provisioning, content data, content gate, /api/sync, Zustand store
steps: S05: Infrastructure provisioning — test Upstash MCP, provision Redis, create Vercel project, set env vars
S06: Content data files — typed questions.ts + skills.ts wrappers (copy from zzz/, add TypeScript types)
S07: CONTENT GATE — user reviews questions.ts and skills.ts for clinical accuracy. [PAUSES — requires user approval]
S08: /api/sync serverless function — GET (fetch from Redis) + POST (write to Redis) with UUID validation
S09: Zustand store — useStore.ts with persist middleware (key: fap_store, version: 1, migrate template, all actions)
sprint_structure.validation_checkpoint: Upstash Redis responds to test commands. /api/sync returns 200 on local Vercel dev. Store persists to localStorage and rehydrates on page reload.
sprint_structure.sprint_blocker: S07 is a hard gate — S08 and S09 must wait for user approval of S07

sprint_structure.name: Core Algorithm
sprint_structure.focus: PRNG, device ID, 5-state machine, session builder — the technical core of the app
steps: S10: mulberry32 PRNG + seededShuffle + seedFromSessionId (src/lib/prng.ts) + Device ID utility (src/lib/deviceId.ts)
S11: 5-state algorithm (src/lib/algorithm.ts) — isFastTap, hasReversalInWindow, applyAnswer, isMaintenanceDue
S12: Algorithm validation — manual test of all 5 state transitions, reversal detection, fast-tap exclusion
S13: Session builder (src/lib/sessionBuilder.ts) — buildSessionQueue with tier ordering and PRNG shuffle
sprint_structure.validation_checkpoint: Run algorithm manually: create 5 sample QuestionRecords, call applyAnswer() through all states, verify state transitions match spec. Session queue for 10 questions produces correct tier ordering.
sprint_structure.sprint_blocker: S11 must complete before S12; S12 must pass before S13

sprint_structure.name: Hooks & Analytics
sprint_structure.focus: Session lifecycle hook, sync hook, analytics computations
steps: S14: Analytics computations (src/lib/analytics.ts) — computeTopicStats, computeEstimatedScore, readyToTest logic
S15: useSession hook (src/hooks/useSession.ts) — startSession, recordAnswer (with fast-tap detection), nextQuestion, endSession
S16: useSync hook (src/hooks/useSync.ts) — autoSync interval (60s dirty-flag), manualSave, restoreBackup
sprint_structure.validation_checkpoint: analyticsTest: Seed 146 questions in specific states, verify computeTopicStats returns correct mastery%, estimatedScore is correct. sessionTest: Start session, answer 5 questions (2 fast-tap), verify fastTapPending populated, endSession clears session.
sprint_structure.sprint_blocker: S15 depends on sessionBuilder from S13

sprint_structure.name: Study Tab UI
sprint_structure.focus: The primary user-facing feature — question display, answer selection, feedback, session flow
steps: S17: AnswerOption component — 4 visual states (idle, selected-correct, selected-incorrect, revealed-correct) with design system colors
S18: ExplanationPanel component — explanation text, result badge, fast-tap warning, Next button
S19: QuestionCard component — question display, option list, timing start/stop, calls useSession.recordAnswer
S20: SessionSummary component — end-of-session stats (count, correct%, fast-taps, state distribution)
S21: StudyTab component — session orchestrator (auto-start, QuestionCard vs SessionSummary routing)
sprint_structure.validation_checkpoint: Manual study flow: open app, see question, select answer, see explanation, advance. Session ends after queue exhausted. SessionSummary shows correct stats. Fast-tap triggers warning.
sprint_structure.sprint_blocker: S17+S18 must complete before S19; S19+S20 must complete before S21

sprint_structure.name: Skills & Progress Tabs
sprint_structure.focus: Practical skills guide and analytics dashboard
steps: S22: SkillCard component — expandable accordion with steps, commonErrors, evaluationCriteria
S23: SkillsTab component — 12 skills list with single-expand accordion state
S24: ScoreDisplay component — estimated score (large display), ready-to-test banner (score >= 80% + all topics >= 75%)
S25: TopicGrid component — 11-cell grid with red/yellow/green color coding per topic mastery%
S26: WeakTopics + ProgressTab — WeakTopics (3 lowest by masteryPercent) + ProgressTab assembling all progress components
sprint_structure.validation_checkpoint: Skills tab: expand/collapse SkillCard works, all 12 skills render. Progress tab: seed some mastered questions, verify TopicGrid shows green cells, ScoreDisplay shows correct %, WeakTopics shows correct names.
sprint_structure.sprint_blocker: S22 before S23; S24+S25 before S26

sprint_structure.name: Settings, Navigation & App Assembly
sprint_structure.focus: Settings tab, bottom navigation, iOS install banner, app shell, entry point
steps: S27: SyncControls component — Save button (POST /api/sync), Restore button (GET /api/sync + confirm modal), last sync timestamp
S28: SettingsTab component — mounts useSync for auto-sync, renders SyncControls, shows content version
S29: BottomNav component — 4 tabs, active indicator (gradient), 44px touch targets, setActiveTab calls
S30: IOSInstallBanner — iOS Safari detection, dismissible, stores dismissal in Zustand
S31: AppShell component — 4 tab containers with CSS display:none toggle, BottomNav fixed bottom
S32: App.tsx + main.tsx — store initialization (initializeQuestions, resolveDeviceId, setDeviceId), render AppShell + IOSInstallBanner
sprint_structure.validation_checkpoint: Full app renders to first question with zero console errors. All 4 tabs switch correctly. Bottom nav active state updates. iOS banner shows on iOS user agent. Store initializes all 146 questions on first load.
sprint_structure.sprint_blocker: S27 before S28; S29+S30+all tab components before S31; S31 before S32

sprint_structure.name: Deployment & Validation
sprint_structure.focus: Production build, deploy, and full acceptance testing
steps: S33: Production build + verification — vite build, du -sh dist/ (verify < 5MB), verify service worker generates
S34: Vercel deployment — vercel deploy --prod, verify app loads at production URL, /api/sync responds

S35: Acceptance validation — offline test (all 4 tabs in airplane mode after first visit), PWA install check, manual sync test, algorithm end-to-end (advance one question through New→Active→Near-Mastery)
sprint_structure.validation_checkpoint: All 7 success criteria from SSOT section 7 verified: SC-001 through SC-007.
sprint_structure.sprint_blocker: S33 before S34; S34 before S35

granularity_rules.config: Batch related config into 1 step (e.g., vite.config.ts + index.html + icons = 1 step)
granularity_rules.types: All type definitions in 1 step — they are pure interfaces with no logic
granularity_rules.utilities: Batch small pure functions (PRNG + deviceId = 1 step)
granularity_rules.algorithm: Always 1 dedicated step per algorithm component — highest risk, needs isolation
granularity_rules.hooks: 1 step per hook — medium complexity with Zustand interactions
granularity_rules.ui_leaf: 1 step per leaf component (AnswerOption, ExplanationPanel, SkillCard)
granularity_rules.ui_composite: 1 step per composite/page component (StudyTab, SkillsTab, ProgressTab)
granularity_rules.integration: 1 step per external service (Upstash provisioning = 1 step)
granularity_rules.deployment: 1 step each for build, deploy, and validation

highest_complexity_areas: 5-state algorithm (comp-010): reversal detection and session-based mastery gates are nuanced — explicitly validate with test cases before advancing
useSession hook (comp-015): manages fast-tap detection timing + queue management across multiple function calls — most stateful hook in the app
Infrastructure provisioning (comp-009): external dependency; Upstash MCP authentication status is unknown until tested
recommended_review_points: After Sprint 3 S12 (algorithm validation) — verify all 5 transitions before building any UI on top
After Sprint 4 S15 (useSession) — verify session lifecycle end-to-end before Study Tab UI
After Sprint 7 S32 (full assembly) — verify app initialization and tab switching before deployment
risk_assessment.context_notes: Single-executor model (one Claude instance per sprint). Steps are sized to complete in 1-3 file edits each. No sprint should exceed 30 minutes of Claude work. Context window will not be a limiting factor at this granularity.

vision_anchor_coverage.performance_based_mastery: Sprint 3 algorithm (no calendar fields), Sprint 4 session builder
vision_anchor_coverage.single_user_no_accounts: No auth components anywhere in the plan — covered by absence
vision_anchor_coverage.zero_manual_setup: Sprint 2 Upstash MCP + Vercel CLI — no dashboard URLs
vision_anchor_coverage.user_verified_content: Sprint 2 content gate S07 — hard pause before UI build
vision_anchor_coverage.react_vite_locked: Sprint 1 scaffolding — enforced by project template
vision_anchor_coverage.atomic_build_tasks: 35 steps each producing 1-3 files — every step executable without ambiguity
